overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban park transitioning into a neon-lit commercial plaza with holographic advertisements. The scene features heavy rainfall, teal neon lighting, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park pathway with neon lighting and heavy rainfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked park pathway, passing vertical neon light posts and tall trees

notable_agents.action: standing near a vertical neon light post on the pathway
sitting on a bench beside the path

tall cylindrical light post emitting bright teal neon light
wet concrete path reflecting the neon lights from above
low concrete wall covered in graffiti tags and street art
concrete bench with a person sitting on it

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban park pathway at night, surrounded by dense trees that block most of the sky. Vertical neon light posts cast a teal glow on the wet concrete walkway. A few NPCs are scattered about—one standing near a light post and another sitting on a bench—while the camera moves steadily forward through the tranquil, rain-filled environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide staircase ascending to commercial plaza

events.description: exits the tree-covered park area into the open stairway leading to commercial district
begins ascending the wide stone stairs toward the plaza above

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the commercial plaza above, with neon-lit buildings visible ahead

notable_agents.action: ascending the stairs ahead of the ego
descending the stairs toward the ego

entered.detail: broad stone staircase leading upward to the commercial district
massive digital billboard displaying COLA advertisement visible at the top of the stairs
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
metal railings lining both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the park into a wide, open stairway leading upward into a commercial district. The environment transitions from dense vegetation to urban architecture as the character ascends the stone stairs. A massive COLA billboard becomes visible at the top of the stairs, glowing against the night sky, while other pedestrians move up and down the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and continues forward through the commercial plaza
turns right to enter the covered walkway section

agents.ego_description: walking through the open commercial plaza surrounded by massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking past the ego in the plaza
standing near the base of the COLA billboard

entered.detail: wooden plank flooring of the commercial plaza reflecting neon lights
free-standing holographic display showing rotating advertisements
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a vast commercial plaza bathed in neon light. The wooden deck flooring stretches out toward massive digital billboards, including the prominent COLA advertisement. Holographic kiosks and overhead pedestrian bridges add to the cyberpunk atmosphere as the camera navigates through moderate crowds of pedestrians before turning toward a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with wall-mounted digital advertisements

events.description: enters the covered commercial walkway from the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the covered commercial walkway with digital advertisements lining the walls

notable_agents.action: walking toward the ego in the corridor
standing and looking at a wall advertisement

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with overhead covering protecting from rain
large digital screens mounted on the right wall displaying advertisements
shop fronts with illuminated signage along the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a covered commercial walkway that provides shelter from the rain. The environment becomes more enclosed, with wall-mounted digital billboards lining the right side and commercial storefronts on the left. The lighting remains predominantly neon and teal, reflecting off the paved tile floor as the camera continues forward through moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, rain-soaked urban park into a sprawling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a wet concrete pathway under a canopy of dense trees, where teal neon light posts cast a glow over scattered pedestrians in the tranquil rain. As the camera moves forward, the vegetation gives way to a wide stone stairway that leads upward, revealing a massive, glowing COLA billboard against the night sky. The scene then opens into a vast commercial plaza with wooden decking and holographic kiosks, navigating through crowds beneath overhead pedestrian bridges and towering digital advertisements. Finally, the camera transitions into a covered walkway, shifting from the open rain to an enclosed corridor lined with storefronts and wall-mounted billboards that reflect teal light off the paved tile floor.
